name: Fencing
heroImageStyle: Crew installing a cedar privacy fence in a tidy suburban yard, warm afternoon light
taglineExamples: Stronger fences. Cleaner installs. Better curb appeal.
Built straight, built sturdy, built for your yard.
promptInstructions: Emphasize privacy, property value, durable materials, clean installation, and fast estimates.

name: Roofing
heroImageStyle: Roofing crew replacing architectural shingles on a clean residential roofline
taglineExamples: Protecting homes with roofs built to last.
Local roofing done cleanly, quickly, and correctly.
promptInstructions: Prioritize trust, storm readiness, warranty language, inspection calls to action, and proof from reviews.

name: HVAC
heroImageStyle: Technician servicing a modern outdoor AC condenser beside a well-kept home
taglineExamples: Reliable comfort when your home needs it most.
Fast HVAC service from a local team you can reach.
promptInstructions: Highlight same-day service, seasonal comfort, transparent diagnostics, and emergency repair confidence.

name: Plumbing
heroImageStyle: Licensed plumber repairing under-sink plumbing in a bright residential kitchen
taglineExamples: Clear answers and clean plumbing repairs.
Local plumbing help without the runaround.
promptInstructions: Stress urgency, cleanliness, clear pricing, and confidence for homeowners with active plumbing problems.

name: Landscaping
heroImageStyle: Fresh mulch, trimmed shrubs, and a crisp green lawn outside a local home
taglineExamples: Outdoor spaces that look cared for every week.
Clean, reliable landscaping for homes and businesses.
promptInstructions: Make the page visual, service-plan oriented, and focused on reliability plus curb appeal.

name: Concrete
heroImageStyle: Smooth new concrete driveway being finished by a professional crew
taglineExamples: Concrete work that adds usable space and lasting value.
Clean pours, sharp finishes, dependable crews.
promptInstructions: Feature durability, finish quality, project planning, and before-after transformation language.

name: Junk Removal
heroImageStyle: Friendly junk removal crew loading a clean truck outside a garage
taglineExamples: Fast cleanouts without the heavy lifting.
Point to it. We haul it away.
promptInstructions: Lead with speed, simplicity, transparent estimates, and same-day availability.

name: Painting
heroImageStyle: Painter applying a clean exterior coat to a bright local storefront
taglineExamples: A cleaner finish for the rooms people notice first.
Professional painting with careful prep and crisp lines.
promptInstructions: Emphasize prep work, clean edges, color confidence, and minimal disruption.

name: General Contractor
heroImageStyle: Contractor reviewing plans in a bright kitchen remodel under construction
taglineExamples: One local team to move your project from idea to done.
Clear scopes, steady communication, quality work.
promptInstructions: Center project confidence, communication, licensed professionalism, and clear next-step consultation CTAs.

name: Tree Service
heroImageStyle: Tree service crew safely trimming branches with ropes and clean ground protection
taglineExamples: Safer trees, cleaner yards, careful crews.
Tree work handled safely from first cut to final cleanup.
promptInstructions: Stress safety, insured crew language, storm response, property protection, and cleanup.

name: Pressure Washing
heroImageStyle: Bright driveway half-cleaned by pressure washing with clear before-after contrast
taglineExamples: Instant curb appeal with a cleaner exterior.
Make siding, concrete, and patios look new again.
promptInstructions: Use strong before-after framing, visual proof, exterior care, and quick quote CTAs.

name: Garage Door
heroImageStyle: Technician repairing a residential garage door spring in a clean driveway
taglineExamples: Garage door repairs that get your day moving again.
Fast local help for stuck, noisy, or broken doors.
promptInstructions: Highlight urgent repair, safety, same-day availability, and clear pricing.
